initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT event.event_name
FROM event
JOIN attendance ON event.event_id = attendance.link_to_event
JOIN member ON attendance.link_to_member = member.member_id
JOIN club ON member.member_id = club.vice_president
WHERE club.address = '900 E. Washington St.'
LIMIT 1;

SELECT event.event_name
FROM event
JOIN attendance ON attendance.link_to_event = event.event_id
JOIN member ON attendance.link_to_member = member.member_id
JOIN club ON club.vice_president = member.member_id
WHERE club.address = '900 E. Washington St.'
LIMIT 1;

SELECT event.event_name
FROM event
JOIN attendance ON event.event_id = attendance.link_to_event
JOIN member ON attendance.link_to_member = member.member_id
JOIN club ON member.member_id = club.vice_president
WHERE club.address = '900 E. Washington St.'
LIMIT 1;

SELECT event.event_name
FROM event
JOIN attendance ON event.event_id = attendance.link_to_event
JOIN member ON attendance.link_to_member = member.member_id
JOIN club ON member.member_id = club.vice_president
WHERE club.address = '900 E. Washington St.'
LIMIT 1;

SELECT e.event_name
FROM event e
JOIN attendance a ON e.event_id = a.link_to_event
JOIN member m ON a.link_to_member = m.member_id
JOIN club c ON m.member_id = c.vice_president
WHERE c.address = '900 E. Washington St.'
LIMIT 1;

aggregation.selected_sql:
SELECT e.event_name
FROM event e
JOIN attendance a ON e.event_id = a.link_to_event
JOIN member m ON a.link_to_member = m.member_id
JOIN major maj ON m.link_to_major = maj.major_id
WHERE maj.college = 'Student_Club' AND e.type = 'social'
LIMIT 1;

candidates.sql:
SELECT event.event_name
FROM event
JOIN attendance ON event.event_id = attendance.link_to_event
JOIN member ON attendance.link_to_member = member.member_id
WHERE member.position = 'vice_president'
LIMIT 1;

SELECT e.event_name
FROM event e
JOIN attendance a ON e.event_id = a.link_to_event
JOIN member m ON a.link_to_member = m.member_id
JOIN major maj ON m.link_to_major = maj.major_id
WHERE maj.college = 'Student_Club' AND e.type = 'social'
LIMIT 1;
